interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedServiceCategories
interfaces.description: Get featured service categories and sample services for the homepage hero/tiles.

interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedProjects
interfaces.description: Get featured project case studies for the homepage carousel/grid.

interfaces.name: getServicesOverview
interfaces.description: Get top-level service categories and services for the Services Overview page.

interfaces.name: getServiceDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific service, including available timeline options and related projects.

interfaces.name: submitServiceQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a quote request from a service detail page (e.g., 3–5 Story Office Buildings).

parameters.name: desired_completion_timeline_text
parameters.description: Captured label such as '9–12 months' for display; typically derived from selected timeline option.

interfaces.name: getProjectFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Projects & Case Studies listing page.

interfaces.name: searchProjectCaseStudies
interfaces.description: Search and filter project case studies for the listing page.

interfaces.name: getProjectCaseStudyDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific project case study.

interfaces.name: addProjectToComparison
interfaces.description: Add a project to the current comparison list (managed per user internally).

interfaces.name: getProjectComparisonList
interfaces.description: Get the current comparison list for projects.

interfaces.name: removeProjectFromComparison
interfaces.description: Remove a project from the current comparison list.

interfaces.name: searchBranchesByPostalCode
interfaces.description: Find nearby branches by ZIP/postal code for the Locations & Branch Finder page.

interfaces.name: getBranchDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific branch, including contact info and map coordinates.

interfaces.name: getBranchAvailableTimeSlots
interfaces.description: Get available site visit time slots for a branch on a given date.

parameters.name: morning_only
parameters.description: If true, return only slots that start before 12:00 PM.

interfaces.name: submitSiteVisitAppointment
interfaces.description: Book a site visit appointment for a branch with selected time slot and contact details.

parameters.name: preferred_date
parameters.description: Date chosen by user in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

interfaces.name: getEquipmentCategories
interfaces.description: Get equipment categories for the Equipment Rental catalog sidebar.

interfaces.name: getEquipmentFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter ranges and options for equipment within a category.

interfaces.name: searchEquipmentItems
interfaces.description: Search and filter equipment items for the Equipment Rental catalog.

interfaces.name: getEquipmentDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information and available extras for a specific equipment item.

interfaces.name: addEquipmentToRentalCart
interfaces.description: Add an equipment rental configuration to the current rental cart, creating the cart if needed.

parameters.name: rental_end_date
parameters.description: End date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (inclusive for pricing calculations).

parameters.name: selected_extra_ids
parameters.description: List of selected extras, e.g., standard damage waiver.

interfaces.name: getRentalCart
interfaces.description: Get the current rental cart contents for review and editing.

interfaces.name: updateRentalCartItem
interfaces.description: Update dates, quantity, or extras for an existing rental cart item.

interfaces.name: removeRentalCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the rental cart.

interfaces.name: getRentalSummary
interfaces.description: Get a consolidated rental summary for the Rental Summary & Confirmation page.

interfaces.name: submitRentalOrder
interfaces.description: Submit the rental order for the current cart, including contact and billing details.

interfaces.name: getMaintenanceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Maintenance Programs page.

interfaces.name: searchMaintenancePrograms
interfaces.description: Search and filter maintenance programs.

interfaces.name: getMaintenanceProgramDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific maintenance program.

interfaces.name: submitMaintenanceQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a quote request for a maintenance program from its detail view.

interfaces.name: getTrainingFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Training & Certifications listing page.

interfaces.name: searchTrainingCourses
interfaces.description: Search and filter training courses, considering upcoming sessions for pricing and dates.

parameters.name: start_date_from
parameters.description: Filter sessions starting on/after this date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

parameters.name: start_date_to
parameters.description: Filter sessions starting on/before this date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

interfaces.name: getTrainingCourseDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information and sessions for a specific training course.

interfaces.name: submitCourseRegistration
interfaces.description: Register participants for a specific training course session.

interfaces.name: getCostCalculatorOptions
interfaces.description: Get selectable options and ranges for the online cost calculator.

interfaces.name: calculateCostEstimate
interfaces.description: Calculate an estimated project cost from the cost calculator inputs and store the estimate.

interfaces.name: submitEstimateRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a request to email or convert a cost estimate into a detailed quote.

interfaces.name: getContactPageConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration and options for the Contact & Inquiries page, including design-build budget ranges and contact preferences.

interfaces.name: submitInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a contact or design-build inquiry from the Contact page.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About Us page, including history, mission, stats, certifications, and leadership.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateRentalCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current RentalCart from storage or create a new one, used by rental cart interfaces.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateRentalCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute rental days and monetary totals for a RentalCart after any change.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateProjectComparisonList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or initialize the current ProjectComparisonList for the user.

helperFunctions.name: _resolveServiceTimelineOptions
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch and sort ServiceTimelineOption records for a given service.

helperFunctions.name: _findNearestBranchesByGeo
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute distances between user location (from postal code geocoding) and branches.

helperFunctions.name: _getAvailableBranchTimeSlotsForDate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to filter BranchTimeSlot records by branch, date, and availability flags.

helperFunctions.name: _matchTrainingCoursesWithSessions
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to join TrainingCourse and TrainingSession data for search and pricing.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateCostEstimateInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper implementing cost estimation logic given CostEstimate parameters.
